name: knowledge_backlinks
description: Find which knowledge-base entries reference this one.

name: knowledge_browse
description: Survey the team knowledge base of settled facts and conventions.

name: knowledge_delete
description: Remove a knowledge-base entry that is no longer established or correct.

name: knowledge_link
description: Relate two knowledge-base entries so readers can navigate between them.

name: knowledge_read
description: Read a knowledge-base entry by its exact location.

name: knowledge_search
description: Search the team knowledge base of settled facts and conventions by keyword.

name: knowledge_write
description: Add an entry to the team knowledge base: settled facts, conventions, and reference material that are established and intended to be durable.
